revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category IPA working templates
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=C-yue here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=C-yue for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{#switch:{{{1}}}
|aa=a{{tone-yue|{{{2}}}}}
|aai=aj{{tone-yue|{{{2}}}}}
|aau=aw{{tone-yue|{{{2}}}}}
|aam=am{{tone-yue|{{{2}}}}}
|aan=an{{tone-yue|{{{2}}}}}

|ŋ=ŋ
|?=ʔ

|.=.
|'=.
| '''[unsupported input]'''{{main other|<includeonly></includeonly>}}}}<noinclude>
{{doc|content=
This template defines the phonetic respelling system used by [[Template:IPAc-yue]].  It should not be linked to directly.
 

}}
